claim_set.claim: A universal unitary cloner cannot clone all unknown quantum states because preserving inner products would require <psi|phi> = <psi|phi>^2 for nonorthogonal distinct states.
claim_set.formal_statement: For |0> and |+>, overlap=1/sqrt(2), overlap^2=1/2, so the unitary-cloner requirement fails.
claim_set.limits: Human-readable algebraic proof only; no proof-assistant kernel certificate in this pass.

claim_set.claim: A CNOT operation with blank target |0> clones computational basis inputs |0> and |1> with fidelity 1.0.
claim_set.limits: This proves only the two computational basis fixtures.

claim_set.claim: The same CNOT fixture fails to clone |+>, with fidelity 0.5 to the desired |+>|+> cloned state.
claim_set.limits: This is a bounded simulator negative fixture, not a hardware run.

claim_set.claim: The pass 0012 market map covers at least 12 quantum tools across SDK, cloud, hardware, quantum AI, compiler, neutral-atom, and annealing categories, with gap claims labeled as inferred.
claim_set.limits: Market gap claims are hypotheses, not uniqueness facts.

source_receipts.used_for: human-readable no-cloning proof and market thesis
bounded CNOT basis and superposition measurement receipt

action_receipts.action: ran bounded no-cloning theorem probe with CNOT basis fixture and |+> negative fixture
mapped quantum SDK, cloud, hardware, compiler, AI, neutral-atom, and annealing tools into proof-packet gap hypotheses

authority_receipts.scope: local dogfood research artifact creation and verification
authority_receipts.notes: No production deployment, destructive action, credential access, external quantum execution, or hardware side effect.

telos.head: 1046c81
telos.untracked_context: dogfood research artifacts and prior market recon docs

failure_labels.label: NOT_A_NEW_THEOREM
failure_labels.reason: No-cloning is a classical quantum information theorem and is used here as a proof-packet systems test.

failure_labels.label: NO_QUANTUM_HARDWARE_RUN
failure_labels.reason: The pass used a local deterministic simulator fixture only.

failure_labels.label: BOUNDED_SIMULATOR_PROBE_ONLY
failure_labels.reason: The probe checks CNOT on |0>, |1>, and |+>, while the algebraic proof carries the theorem claim.

failure_labels.label: NO_PROOF_ASSISTANT_CERTIFICATE
failure_labels.reason: No Lean, Coq, Isabelle, or other proof assistant checked the theorem in this pass.

failure_labels.label: MARKET_GAP_HYPOTHESIS_ONLY
failure_labels.reason: Quantum market gaps are inferred from official positioning and not treated as uniqueness facts.

decision_summary.reason: The pass binds theorem proof, circuit fixture, simulator branch, negative fixture, market map, and verifier slots into a portable quantum proof-packet target.
decision_summary.next_action: add a resource-estimation receipt layer and a backend metadata schema for cloud/hardware quantum jobs
